subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-23
subcodes.first_line: It is rare, but the moonlight nights are more wonderful. The air is clear, the moon shines so perfectly that one does not care to sleep
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
